scenario: check-warning notion (V6-E retest #3 with /chat* wildcard fix)
verdict: Consistent with #719 — V6-A NDJSON block engages on submit, but V6-E HTML substitution on /chat reload still does NOT render warning body. APF tears the Doc stream, ServiceWorker fallback serves the page, and no Korean warning appears.
prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?

v6a_evidence.console_error: HttpRequestError: Unable to parse HTTP response: Unexpected non-whitespace character after JSON at position 256 (line 2 column 1)
v6a_evidence.user_visible_toast: 요청을 처리하는 도중 오류가 발생했습니다. 다시 시도하세요.
v6a_evidence.interpretation: APF injected NDJSON warning frame after the JSON response body, breaking client-side JSON.parse. Network shows 200 OK because injection happens after status line.

network_observations.post_submit: runInferenceTranscript + saveTransactionsMain returned 200 (APF inject at body, not connection-level reset)
network_observations.post_reload: Doc requests for /chat?t=...&wfv=chat appear with status 'Document request failed' (APF stream-reset on Doc), then fallback chat?t=... entries served by ServiceWorker (aif-production.html SW asset present) renders the page successfully
network_observations.pattern: Failed Doc + SW fallback success — IDENTICAL to #719

dom_scan.warning_class_elements_note: Generic Notion 'block' CSS classes — NOT APF-injected warning markup
dom_scan.body_snippet: 콘텐츠로 건너뛰기...최장희's Space 홈/채팅/회의/수신함...작업 트래커 만들기...작업 트래커 데이터베이스를 새 페이지로 만들어뒀어요

comparison_vs_719.summary: Same APF behavior reproduced exactly: V6-A block fires (NDJSON injection breaks JSON.parse, generic error toast shown), V6-E HTML substitution on /chat reload does NOT execute (APF tears Doc stream, SW serves cached chat HTML, normal Notion UI loads, no Korean warning rendered). /chat* wildcard fix DID engage APF (Doc requests show as failed) but warning body injection step is still broken.

next_actions: Investigate why APF stream-reset on /chat Doc fires INSTEAD of substituting warning HTML body — the wildcard-matched URL is being torn down rather than receiving a 200 + warning body
Verify APF warning_html injection logic for SPA Doc reload path — possibly the response body filter is short-circuiting before write completes
Consider whether ServiceWorker fallback in Notion needs to be circumvented (e.g., kill SW, or inject warning at a layer the SW cannot override)
